birds
my name

My name is Youngji Sohn, written as 손 영지 in Korean. The first is my family name, and the latter is my given name. My late grandfather gave me this name.

It's pronounced /jʌŋ.dʑi/ in Korean, but "young-jee" is also a good approximation.

© 2026 Youngji Sohn
